s3.storagelens.encryption.CfnAbout: This resource contains the type of server-side encryption used to encrypt an Amazon S3 Storage Lens metrics export. For valid values, see the [ StorageLensDataExportEncryption](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/API/API_control_StorageLensDataExportEncryption.html) in the *Amazon S3 API Reference*.

s3.storagelens.encryption.SSEKMS.Description: Specifies the use of AWS Key Management Service keys (SSE-KMS) to encrypt the S3 Storage Lens metrics export file.

s3.storagelens.encryption.SSES3.Description: Specifies the use of an Amazon S3-managed key (SSE-S3) to encrypt the S3 Storage Lens metrics export file.
